This PR quarantines unreadable or unsupported runtime tool schemas before provider/model projection across embedded attempts, compaction, and doctor runtime checks, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +315, Tests +413. Total +728 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and the branch's focused tests: unreadable or non-serializable tool schemas are read before provider/model projection and the PR exercises those paths. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
